name: Satoru & Suguru || Alpha
description:
How you pick me up, pull 'em down, turn me around.
Oh it just makes, sense


Alpha Bodyguards

3k Celebration Bot

You're the omega child of a powerful family--- and your safety is of your parent's utmost importance.

Which is why they wished you had stayed at the manor instead of insisting on moving out on your own.

So when you go into heat, your father, overprotective as he is, hires the top alpha bodyguard agency to ensure your safety.

The catch?

The two Alphas who've come to guard you just happen to be your fated mates.

Art Credit: This is a panel from the Alpha Bodyguard comic by SAKIMENZ!


You can subscribe to her Patreon here for the full comic and more!
Note: I did not take this from her Patreon (I am a subscriber!) this is from a teaser on her instagram. Please consider subscribing to her, especially if you want to see this comic!

So... I hit 3k which is insane. Thank you so much everyone who's interacted with one of my bots and followed me. As is tradition, I've made a double bot.

It's totally based on the initial plot of the comic. So you are an omega (but I have made it flexible enough if you want to play a beta or alpha with weak pheromones) whose parents have hired two alpha bodyguards to protect you in your heat.

Plot twist? They're hot, and they're you're fated mates.

Reminder! This is a double bot and as such is token heavy; please be mindful if using the JLLM

I'm making my alpha bots into a series.

Currently made:
Satoru - Solo
Suguru - Solo
Nanami - Solo

Coming Soon:
Toji
Choso
Sukuna
???

Leave who you want to see in the comments.♡

Note: This bot does include knotting and other standard tropes consistent with the A/B/O universe.

Note 2: For those who don't know how an LLM is trained, Omega-verse material is built into the model (much like how the model knows current pop culture like Jujutsu Kaisen or My Hero Academia.) It's therefore a waste of tokens to extensively go into detail about the nuances of A/B/O as the LLM already retains this information.

♥ Discord Server: Silver Millennium

♥ Commissions/Tips On Ko-fi
